sizing_rule.note: Position size = Total Equity / (1/optimal_f in dollars). Example: f=0.19 yields 1 unit per $52.63 equity; f=0.1081663 yields 1 contract per $2,645 equity. Optimal f derived from Equation (3.30) on P&L or Equation (5.14) on outcome column.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing total equity by the dollar amount derived from optimal f calculation, where optimal f represents the fraction of equity to risk per trade.
